review_meta.notes: Worked expert-review example confirming the higher-mode D-B08 reference evaluation and its continuity-aware process-breakdown rationale.

review_reason.description: This reference review confirms that the D-B08 slice remains a legitimate higher-mode fairness/process-breakdown anchor rather than a disguised package-quality case.

expert_findings.narrative_summary: The primary evaluation remains a sound higher-mode reference judgment. The run treats repeated interruption and participation imbalance as a process-breakdown problem, attempts repair before escalation, and then moves into M3 co-handling without drifting back into autonomous package work.
expert_findings.evidence_notes: The strongest confirming evidence is the alignment between interaction_trace.json, flags.json, summary.txt, and continuity/continuity_packet.json. Together they preserve when the case crossed from repairable tension into meaningful process breakdown and why human co-handling, rather than more option work, became the correct next posture.

final_review_outcome.final_disposition_note: Retain this case as the expert-reviewed higher-mode reference alongside the D-B04 caution anchor and the D-B05/D-B06 M0 anchors.
